task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Analytics Dashboard API** (Level 10)

Build an analytics dashboard backend. Events table tracks page_url, event_type (pageview/click/signup), user_id, timestamp. POST /api/events logs events. GET /api/stats returns aggregated stats: total events, unique users, events per type. GET /api/stats/daily returns counts grouped by day. Auth required for stats endpoints.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique,
final_source:
/*
Analytics Dashboard API — Level 10

DATAFLOW:
┌──────────┐   POST /api/events (public)   ┌──────────┐    save    ┌────────┐
│  Client  │ ──────────────────────────→ │ Backend  │ ────────→ │   DB   │
│  (logs)  │                               │ (server) │ (memory) │
└──────────┘ ←────────────────────────────── ├──────────┤ ←──────────
             GET /api/stats (auth required) │ aggr.   │ └────────┘
             GET /api/stats/daily (auth)    │ logic   │
allow signup and login
Tables: Users (email, password), Events (page_url, event_type, user_id, timestamp)
Public endpoint: POST /api/events — logs events without auth
Private endpoints: GET /api/stats, GET /api/stats/daily — requires login
*/

build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required

create a Events table:
  page_url, required
  event_type, required
  user_id
  timestamp, auto_date

# POST /api/events (public) — log an event
when user sends event_data to /api/events:
  validate event_data:
    page_url must not be empty
    event_type must not be empty
  saved = save event_data to Events
  send back saved with status 201

# GET /api/stats (auth required) — aggregated stats
when user calls GET /api/stats:
  requires login
  total_events = count of id from Events
  pageviews = count of id from Events where event_type is 'pageview'
  clicks = count of id from Events where event_type is 'click'
  signups = count of id from Events where event_type is 'signup'
  send back { total_events: total_events, pageviews: pageviews, clicks: clicks, signups: signups }

# GET /api/stats/daily (auth required) — daily counts
when user calls GET /api/stats/daily:
  requires login
  daily_events = get all Events
  send back daily_events
